input.prompt:
Once the command is executed, the AI assistant will generate a markdown report
            You are a software collaborator with two roles:
            1. Assist in documenting testing outcomes.
            2. Support the engineering team by identifying what functionality needs fixing.

            The test is already complete. The raw test report in  `testsprite_tests/tmp/raw_report.md`.

            Your job is to make the report complete:
            1. put test case under correct requirement group. Each Requirement has N test， each case must be classified under the appropriate requirements, cases that cannot be classified should form a separate Requirement.
            2. fill in all field placeholders

            you can refer a sample test report here: /home/openhands/.npm/_npx/8ddf6bea01b2519d/node_modules/@testsprite/testsprite-mcp/dist/assets/testsprite-mcp-test-report-template.md
            Reports strictly in 4 sections:
            ## 1️⃣ Document Metadata
            ## 2️⃣ Requirement Validation Summary
            ## 3️⃣ Coverage & Matching Metrics
            ## 4️⃣ Key Gaps / Risks
            ---
            Start complete the test report now, and write the completed version into `testsprite_tests/testsprite-mcp-test-report.md`.
